title: Vellai Mayil Lyrics Samar Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song:Vellai mayil
Singer: Udith Narayanan, Shwetha
Movie: Samar
Music : Yuvan Shankar Raja
Lyrics: Na. Muthukumar		 Other Song Lyrics
Azhago Azhagu
Poikkaal Kuthirai
Vellai Mayil
Rajaavin Thotathil
Oru Kannil Vegam
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Vellai mayil vennilaavil koothaada ,
oru kanni puyal kangalukul kaathaada,
unnai kadhal endra vaarthayaale
solli solli naan paada .

Ezhu vanna pattaampoochi azhagodu ,
un sollukkaaga kaathirupen uyirodu ,
naan kadhal endra poottukulley
vazhavendum Unnodu ..

Asasai ninaivadi idhu aaraam piraiyadi,
Unnai kandaen oru nodi,
Adhu kadhLil mudhal pasi.
Meesai pulliley ival mutham panithuli ..
Iru idhayam serndhapin ini illai idaiveli..

Vellai mayil vennilaavil koothaada ,
oru kanni puyal kangalukul kaathaada,
unnai kadhal endra vaarthayaale
solli solli naan paada .

Ezhu vanna pattaampoochi azhagodu ,
un sollukkaaga kaathirupen uyirodu ,
naan kadhal endra poottukulley
vazhavendum Unnodu ..

Brindhaavanam, thoongaadhu vaanam ,
Ringaaram paadum vandu
endhan kaiyyodu venum ..
Raakozhiyaai koovuthu moochu,
Karigai noolil neitha
selai mundhaanai aachu.

Sadhai nila unnai nenjiley ,
Vidhaiyena moodi vaikavaa.
Madham pidithaadum yaanaiyaai,
Manakulam venneeraai
vendhum poopookudhey..

Moonraam pirai munnooru megam
soozhndhaalum indha thingal
undhan kannadiyAgum.
Aana varai aanandha mogam ,
Annaandhu paarthaal
endhan kadhal aagaayam aagum.

Mazhai thuli vaanil thanginaal ,
manalveli eeram aagumaa .
Sugam sugam endru kooriye,
Mudhal mudhal mutham ennum
poovai Killi muthaadavaa...

Meesai pulliley ival mutham panithuli ..
Iru idhayam serndhapin ini illai idaiveli.. English Translation
I tried my best :)
[english lyric]

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Vellai Mayil?

The song Vellai Mayil expresses themes of love and longing, portraying the beauty of romantic feelings through its lyrics.

What is the context of this song in the movie Samar?

In Samar, the song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, highlighting the connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Vellai Mayil?

The song is sung by Shweta Mohan and Udit Narayan, both renowned for their melodious voices.

Who composed the music for Vellai Mayil?

The music for Vellai Mayil was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his unique musical style.

When was Vellai Mayil released?

Vellai Mayil was released on December 5, 2012, as part of the movie Samar.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vellai Mayil, the enchanting duet unfolds a tale of love and admiration, perfectly encapsulating the emotions of the characters in Samar. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of romance, making it a perfect fit for weddings and celebrations. As Shweta Mohan and Udit Narayan's voices blend seamlessly, listeners are transported to a dreamy world of affection. This track not only highlights the beauty of love but also showcases the exceptional musical prowess of Yuvan Shankar Raja.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vellai Mayil from Samar is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Shweta Mohan and Udit Narayan, paired with Yuvan Shankar Raja's magical composition, this song is sure to resonate with your heart. Dive into the lyrical beauty crafted by Na Muthukumar and let the soothing melodies transport you to a world of romance.
stanzaMeanings: The white peacock dances in the moonlight, a gentle breeze whispers in the eyes of a girl, I sing by saying the words of love.
With seven colored butterflies, I wait for your words with my life, I want to live in the garden of love with you.
This is a sweet memory, like the crescent moon, seeing you for a moment, that is the first hunger. She kisses me softly.
After our hearts have joined, there will be no separation.
The white peacock dances in the moonlight, a gentle breeze whispers in the eyes of a girl, I sing by saying the words of love.
With seven colored butterflies, I wait for your words with my life, I want to live in the garden of love with you.
In Brindavan, the sky never sleeps, I want to hold the one who sings with my hands. The call of the night is sweet, the thread of fate has tied us together.
The moon always thinks of you, may it bless you with its light. Even if I am like an elephant caught in a trap, I need to bloom like a flower.
Even if the third moon is surrounded by clouds, this moon will be your mirror. But until then, the joy of love will become my sky.
When raindrops fall from the sky, will the sandy land become fertile? If I say comfort, the first kiss will be like a flower, will the parrot sing?
She kisses me softly. After our hearts have joined, there will be no separation.
